## Honesty Plus Quality Is STEEL POINT

## Serving Pune's Construction Industry For 35+ Years.

[![](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/products_we_deals_1.svg)](https://steelpoint.co.in/products/)

![Honesty Plus Quality Is STEEL POINT Serving Pune's Construction Industry For 35+ Years.](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/working-hard-building-man-construction-worker-1-1.jpg)

# Trusted Reinforcement Steel Bars (TMT) Supplier

## STEEL POINT For All  Your Reinforcement  Steel Bars (TMT) Requirements

[![](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/products_we_deals_1.svg)](https://steelpoint.co.in/products/)

![STEEL POINT, Serving Pune's Construction Industry For 35+ Years.](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/steel-bar-site-construction-1.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-01](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-01.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-02](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-02.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-01](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-01.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-02](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-02.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-01](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-01.jpg)

![Mobile Banner-02](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Mobile-Banner-02.jpg)

![For the past 35 years, STEEL POINT is serving Maharashtra's construction industry with supplying of quality steel, on time, every time.](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/35-year.svg)

## Quality Assurance

Reinforcement Steel Bars (TMT) supplied by us are procured from best system run plants and after undergoing all quality controls to ensure strength, durability and safety in all construction projects.

## Ethos

We believe that quality in supply and service is what sustains goodwill and enhances relationships. We are committed to this across our supply chain through transparency in communication and maintaining the highest level of quality in service.

## Founder's Message

At STEEL POINT Group, we pride ourselves on our ability to meet client requests with passion and above all with solutions that are based on high level of commitment on quality delivery. We value our clients’ opinions and for over last 35 PLUS years, our reputation has gone from strength to strength in delivering what we promise. Driven by a strong foundation of beliefs and values, our team has partnered with almost all players in the infrastructure and construction industry in the region and we are indebted to this industry which has grown over the years of which we also are a part.

Over the years, we have also been able to build a team of committed individuals whose knowledge and experience have been a key factor in addressing the growing needs of our patrons which has been the cornerstone of our success.

Our business world has gone through a period of significant turbulences over time and each time has emerged better and stronger. We too have addressed this aspect of business and our processes and systems have continuously been upgraded to fit this in the interest of customer satisfaction.

With a focus on going beyond Reinforcement Steel Bars (TMT) that has been our main product line since inception, we have also added construction materials and AAC blocks through our recent initiative GRAVITAS BUILDCON LLP over the last few years. Needless to mention, the search for new solutions and products would continue to be our initiative that would help us serve the industry better in time to come.

**Thank you for visiting our site.**

Ramesh Sanghvi,

STEEL POINT Group.

Happy Clients

![](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/fast-delivery-1.svg)

# Efficient Deliveries,   At your construction site

No more delays or hassle of deliveries, we’ve got you covered. Our team ensures that your steel arrives on time and in top-notch condition, so you can focus on building without any interruptions.

## Get in Touch

## Let’s Schedule Your Next Steel Requirements.

## Experience our strength

With an experienced team well versed in the supply chain challenges of the commodity, it gives us great pride to address on time deliveries successfully to our ever growing list of patrons and across most sites in and around the region; thus our attempt has always been to be a one stop solution for the growing needs of the construction industry through our increasing basket of products.

## New initiative

[![Gravitas, a sister concern of STEEL POINT, Partner of your Construction chemicals.](https://steelpoint.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/New-Logo-01.svg)](https://gravitasllp.com/)

GRAVITAS BUILDCON LLP, the latest venture by STEEL POINT, which is dedicated to supplying high quality construction chemicals that cater to the diverse needs of the construction industry. Our product range includes adhesives, sealants, waterproofing solutions, and other specialized chemicals designed to enhance the durability, efficiency, and sustainability of building projects. With a legacy of excellence and a commitment to innovation, Gravitas aims to be a reliable partner in your construction endeavors, ensuring that every project stands the test of time.

[Visit the Site](https://gravitasllp.com/)

data.summary: Steel Point has been serving Pune's construction industry for over 35 years, specializing in the supply of quality reinforcement steel bars (TMT) and other construction materials. The company's ethos revolves around honesty, quality assurance, and transparency in communication. They pride themselves on timely deliveries and strong client relationships, stating a commitment to meet industry needs through innovation. Their new initiative, Gravitas Buildcon LLP, focuses on providing construction chemicals to enhance project durability and efficiency. Steel Point emphasizes continuous improvement in their processes and services.
